title: gladiolus tristis var. aestivalis
intro: Gladiolus tristis var. aestivalis, also known as the glacial sword lily, is a variant of the Gladiolus tristis species that is native to the mountainous regions of the Northern Hemisphere. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Gladiolus tristis var. aestivalis include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water or oil, and it is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves.
